description: Modify the QuickSnap app to properly handle the CAMERA permission using modern AndroidX APIs. The app currently crashes when the 'Open Camera' button is clicked because it lacks the permission in the manifest and the runtime request logic. Update the manifest to include the CAMERA permission and implement the runtime permission request in MainActivity.kt using ActivityResultContracts. The app should check for permission before attempting to start the camera and initiate the request if permission is not yet granted. Ensure the app compiles successfully.
